SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities

Record Class SkinData

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.noorlandmc.NoorEntities.SkinData
public record SkinData(String skinDisplayName, UUID skinProfileId, String skinTextureValue, String skinTextureSignature) extends Record
A simple data class that holds skin information for humanoid entities in the NoorEntities plugin. This includes the display name for the skin, the UUID of the player profile associated with the skin, and the texture value and signature used to apply the skin to a mannequin entity.

The skinDisplayName is a string that can be used for reference or debugging purposes, while the skinProfileId is a UUID that corresponds to a player profile containing the skin data. The skinTextureValue and skinTextureSignature are used together to apply the custom skin to a mannequin when it spawns.

      public SkinData(String skinDisplayName, UUID skinProfileId, String skinTextureValue, String skinTextureSignature)

      Parameters:
      skinDisplayName - the value for the skinDisplayName record component

      skinTextureValue - the value for the skinTextureValue record component
      skinTextureSignature - the value for the skinTextureSignature record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
